subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Cause of God! After several years, permission to circumambulate the Sacred Precincts hath been granted unto Mirza Muharram and Zarqani [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی امر الله جناب میرزا محرم و زرقانی را بعد از چند سال اجازه طواف مطاف
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Theosophy, @pantheism, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
